name: Ariel's Café
description: Our generous hosts at Shellharbour Civic Centre. Great coffee, great people. Ariel's Café is the warm, welcoming heart of the Shellharbour Civic Centre — the perfect spot for a networking catch-up over a great cup of coffee.

name: Artist Sarah Rowan
description: Sarah Rowan is an Australian speed painter and keynote speaker who brings live art to corporate events, fundraisers and conferences. Combining storytelling with real-time painting, she helps people and organisations rediscover their spark — and has raised hundreds of thousands of dollars for charity along the way.

name: Conseek
description: Conseek provides independent digital forensic and financial investigation expertise in complex criminal, civil and family law matters. The firm delivers expert witness services, financial reconstruction, asset tracing and device forensic analysis — supporting law firms and individuals navigating intricate evidence in litigation.

name: 4T Solutions
description: 4T Solutions delivers affordable cybersecurity and IT services for Australian small and medium businesses. From security audits and employee training to AI governance advisory and staffing solutions, they help local businesses protect their data, meet compliance standards and scale with confidence.

name: Growth Concept Development Services
description: Growth Concept Development Services (GCDS) helps businesses and organisations grow through community engagement, commercial development and strategic partnerships. Drawing on nearly 30 years of experience in events and exhibitions, GCDS delivers tradeshows, networking events, project management and local activations across the region.

name: Scaffold Drafting Consultancy
description: Scaffold Drafting Consultancy delivers practical, compliant scaffold designs built for real site conditions across Australia. The firm serves residential, industrial and civil projects, and offers millimetre-precise site scanning using LiDAR technology to support construction planning and safety compliance.

name: Service NSW
description: Service NSW is the primary gateway for accessing NSW Government services online and in person. It helps residents and businesses manage vehicle registrations, driver licences, permits and a wide range of government transactions — as well as providing support for disaster relief, disability assistance and business programs.

name: Sharon Alva Photography
description: Sharon Alva Photography specialises in creative portrait sessions across newborn, pregnancy, family and business photography. With 15 years of professional experience and a background in child and family nursing, Sharon creates relaxed, personalised sessions that capture genuine moments across the Illawarra, Southern Highlands and Shoalhaven.

name: Shellharbour City Council
description: Shellharbour City Council is the local government authority serving the Shellharbour region, delivering services across planning and development, community programs, environmental management and local governance. The Council is a proud partner in building a vibrant, connected community across the Shellharbour Local Government Area.
